[Coffee Mate MCP Server](../../../../../index.md) / service/coffee/module/get-coffees/get-coffees.service

# service/coffee/module/get-coffees/get-coffees.service

> **Service Layer**

Get-coffees service — retrieves all coffee drinks and registers the
corresponding MCP tool.

## Remarks

Exports two symbols:

| Export                                                        | Role                                                 |
| ------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------- |
| [GetCoffeesService](classes/GetCoffeesService.md)             | Effect service with `execute` and `executeFormatted` |
| [registerGetCoffeesTool](functions/registerGetCoffeesTool.md) | Wires the service to the MCP SDK via `registerTool`  |

The service depends on [CoffeeRepository](../../../repository/coffee-repository/classes/CoffeeRepository.md) through Effect’s DI
and never fails (error channel is `never`).

## Classes

| Class                                             | Description                                                          |
| ------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| [GetCoffeesService](classes/GetCoffeesService.md) | Effect service for retrieving all coffee drinks from the repository. |

## Functions

| Function                                                      | Description                                               |
| ------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------- |
| [registerGetCoffeesTool](functions/registerGetCoffeesTool.md) | Registers the `get-coffees` MCP tool on the given server. |
